channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Remembering drummer James Gadson, who worked with greats like Bill Withers
item.description: The drummer James Gadson has died. His funky, laid-back style appears on hit records from the 1970s onward.
item.content:encoded: The drummer James Gadson has died. His funky, laid-back style appears on hit records from the 1970s onward.
item.dc:creator: Megan Lim

item.title: What comes next for the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran says it agreed to two weeks of safe passage for ships traversing the Strait of Hormuz, but most vessels are staying put until certain it's safe.
item.content:encoded: Iran says it agreed to two weeks of safe passage for ships traversing the Strait of Hormuz, but most vessels are staying put until certain it's safe.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Northam

item.title: Light snowpack is setting up conditions for drought and fires in the U.S. West
item.description: The West has had one of the worst winters for snowpack on record. The lack of snow is causing drought across much of the reason and spelling trouble for communities.
item.content:encoded: The West has had one of the worst winters for snowpack on record. The lack of snow is causing drought across much of the reason and spelling trouble for communities.
item.dc:creator: Ellis Juhlin

item.title: Once seen as a war hero, Australian ex-soldier will stand trial for alleged war crimes
item.description: Until a few years ago, Ben Roberts-Smith was one of Australia's most celebrated war heroes. But now, he will stand trial for alleged war crimes committed in Afghanistan.
item.content:encoded: Until a few years ago, Ben Roberts-Smith was one of Australia's most celebrated war heroes. But now, he will stand trial for alleged war crimes committed in Afghanistan.
item.dc:creator: Kristina Kukolja

item.title: A manatee is released to the wild after being rescued from a storm drain this winter
item.description: People cheered the release of a manatee this week that had been recuperating after being rescued from a storm drain in Florida this winter.
item.content:encoded: People cheered the release of a manatee this week that had been recuperating after being rescued from a storm drain in Florida this winter.
item.dc:creator: Molly Duerig

item.title: Public university professors in Texas say a new law restricts their academic freedom
item.description: Public universities across Texas have instituted sweeping changes in recent months, from canceling gender studies programs to directing faculty to sign a pledge not to indoctrinate students.
item.content:encoded: Public universities across Texas have instituted sweeping changes in recent months, from canceling gender studies programs to directing faculty to sign a pledge not to indoctrinate students.
item.dc:creator: Camille Phillips

item.title: A Colorado community is working to keep mobile home pricing affordable
item.description: Mobile home parks are an important source of lower-cost housing. In Durango, Colo., one community fights to keep theirs affordable.
item.content:encoded: Mobile home parks are an important source of lower-cost housing. In Durango, Colo., one community fights to keep theirs affordable.
item.dc:creator: Natalie Skowlund

item.title: In tight quarters, Artemis II astronauts stay fit with the flywheel
item.description: The human body isn't meant to exist without gravity. The astronauts aboard Artemis II are combatting potential physiological damage using an elegantly engineered exercise machine called the flywheel.
item.content:encoded: The human body isn't meant to exist without gravity. The astronauts aboard Artemis II are combatting potential physiological damage using an elegantly engineered exercise machine called the flywheel.
item.dc:creator: Katia Riddle

item.title: Birthplace of civil rights and confederacy cradle: Montgomery is packed with history
item.description: Montgomery, Ala., helped shape America — from the cradle of the Confederacy to the birthplace of the civil rights movement to the city's draw today as the place to reflect on the legacy of slavery.
item.content:encoded: Montgomery, Ala., helped shape America — from the cradle of the Confederacy to the birthplace of the civil rights movement to the city's draw today as the place to reflect on the legacy of slavery.
item.dc:creator: Debbie Elliott

item.title: Indonesia's capital of the future faces doubts in the present
item.description: Indonesia is racing to build a new capital, promising a greener, futuristic city. But many citizens aren't convinced it will ever live up to the vision.
item.content:encoded: Indonesia is racing to build a new capital, promising a greener, futuristic city. But many citizens aren't convinced it will ever live up to the vision.
item.dc:creator: Katerina Barton
